name: 7 Mile Playboy Gangster Crips
description: The 7 Mile Playboy Gangster Crips (7M PBGC) emerged in northwest Detroit in the early 2000s as a locally organized set affiliated with the Gangster Crips (3X/Movin'). The group was the subject of a 2019 federal investigation. They maintain a long-term feud with the 7 Mile Rollin 60s Crips, which remains a significant component of Detroit's Crip-affiliated history.

sources.title: Sixteen Members of 7 Mile Playboy Gangster Crips Convicted on Federal RICO Charges
